title: What Is Networth
content: Networth is a measurement of province value used for comparing strength, matchmaking, and target evaluation.

title: What Are Acres
content: Acres represent province land size and influence available for buildings and population.

title: What Is Defense
content: Defense represents a province's ability to resist attacks. Higher defense makes successful attacks more difficult.

title: What Is Offense
content: Offense represents military attack strength used to break enemy defenses and gain land.

title: What Is BE
content: Building Efficiency measures how effectively buildings operate and affects province performance.

title: What Is TPA
content: Thieves Per Acre measures thief density and affects thievery success and operations.

title: What Is WPA
content: Wizards Per Acre measures magical strength and affects spell ability.

title: What Is SPA
content: Soldiers Per Acre measures soldier density and military presence.

title: Reading Intel
content: Province intel provides information needed to evaluate targets and make strategic decisions.

title: Attack Readiness
content: A province is attack ready when armies, resources, intel, and coordination are prepared.

title: Wave Commander Role
content: A wave commander coordinates targets, timing, and communication during kingdom attacks.

title: Intel Coordinator Role
content: An intel coordinator gathers and organizes information for kingdom decision making.

title: War Room Purpose
content: A war room organizes kingdom intelligence, targets, operations, alerts, and planning.

title: Alert System Purpose
content: Alerts help kingdoms react quickly to hostile actions, attacks, and important events.

title: Kingdom Intelligence
content: Kingdom intelligence combines province information to support strategic decisions.

title: Enemy Threat Rating
content: Threat rating evaluates enemy provinces based on strength, role, activity, and strategic importance.
